data.content: Implementation complete: 6 test gaps filled across 4 files (~130 new test lines). CLI warn-not-reject observable test (TOML+JSON), output fallback chain, access_hint/output_hint propagation, resolve_output_specific_sections unit coverage, per-action StepMetadata variation with 4 artifact types, and legacy global output propagation. All tests pass, 95.40% coverage, make sanity green. Branch: worktree-knots-9727-output-target-tests
